articles.title: Hindustan Zinc to Grasim - Jay Thakkar suggests 3 stocks to buy or sell for short-term in F&O segment
articles.description: The Indian stock market declined on investor caution due to escalating Gulf tensions and rising crude oil prices. Nifty 50 and Sensex opened lower, while analysts expect geopolitical uncertainty and foreign selling to keep equities under pressure in the near term.

articles.title: Sensex tumbles over 800 points, Nifty below 23,300. 6 key factors behind today's D-Street rout
articles.description: Indian stock markets experienced a significant downturn today. Benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty saw substantial declines. This drop was fueled by escalating Iran-US tensions and continued selling by foreign institutional investors. Rising oil prices and a weakening rupee also contributed to the cautious sentiment on Dalal Street. Investors are now keenly watching the upcoming RBI commentary.

articles.title: Crude oil prices gain as US-Iran peace deal remains elusive; Brent tops $97/bbl. Where are they headed next?
articles.description: US-Iran war: MCX crude oil price rose as much as 1% to ₹9,039 per barrel. Here's what's driving the crude oil prices today, along with experts opinion on near-term outlook.

articles.title: Oil Prices Rise on Iran Concerns, Stocks Extend Tech-Led Rally
articles.description: Despite Donald Trump's assurances that the United States and Iran are edging closer to ending their three-month-long war and reopening the Strait of Hormuz, crude investors appear unmoved as they await solid progress.

articles.title: Indian shares open tad down amid Iran war jitters
articles.description:
Indian shares opened lower on Wednesday as uncertainty over a U.S.-Iran peace deal kept investors risk-averse, while higher oil prices and persistent foreign outflows also weighed on sentiment.

articles.title: Petrol, Diesel Price Today (June 3): Check fuel rates in Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, Chennai, Gurgaon and other cities
articles.description: Petrol, Diesel Price Today: Fuel prices across India remained stable on June 3, with no significant changes reported in major metro cities for petrol and diesel. Despite global crude oil fluctuations, oil marketing companies maintained current retail rates, offering commuters temporary relief. CNG prices also saw no hikes, contributing to overall transport fuel stability.

articles.title: Rupee falls 19 paise against dollar amid higher oil prices, weak Asian peers
articles.description: Indian rupee opens weaker at 95.45 against US dollar as Gulf tensions lift crude prices, markets eye RBI policy decision and inflation outlook.

articles.title: Gold rate today: MCX gold price rises above ₹1.59 lakh per 10 grams, silver price falls amid renewed US-Iran conflict
articles.description: Gold prices declined in the international market,, as fresh escalation in the US-Iran war in the Middle East pushed crude oil prices higher, cementing fears that interest rates would stay ​higher for longer to tame inflation.

articles.title: Japan Cabinet Approves $19 Bn Extra Budget in Response to Iran War
articles.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said last month that the extra budget would be used to ease the rising cost of petrol, electricity and gas
